html:
Exclusive to:

The Perennial Altar is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together that can only be built by Wendy with the Mourning Glory III skill. It works the same as the Meat Effigy, and is one of the many ways of revival. Players can attune to a Perennial Altar or Meat Effigy at the cost of 40 . When the player is dead, as a ghost they can revive at the Perennial Altar or Meat Effigy they attuned.

After resurrection:

  • is set to 50
  • is set to 2/3 of maximum
  • is set to 1/2 of maximum

Multiple Perennial Altars or Meat Effigies can be built, but each player can attune to only one. An attuned Altar's candle will be lit, while others remain unlit.

The Perennial Altar only works within its shard, allowing a player to have one on the Surface and another in the Caves.

Trivia

  • Wendy has a special animation for reviving from the Perennial Altar.

Assets

  • Idle
  • Hit
  • Turn On
  • Turn Off
  • Place
  • Slide

–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tế Đàn Lâu Năm là một Cấu Trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và chỉ có thể được xây dựng bởi Wendy với kỹ năng Mourning Glory III. Nó hoạt động tương tự như Bù Nhìn Thịt và là một trong nhiều cách hồi sinh. Người chơi có thể điều chỉnh Bàn thờ lâu năm hoặc Bù nhìn thịt với giá 40. Khi người chơi chết, dưới dạng ma, họ có thể hồi sinh tại Bàn thờ lâu năm hoặc Bù nhìn thịt mà họ hòa hợp.

The '''Perennial Altar''' is a [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' that can only be built by [[Wendy/Don't Starve Together|Wendy]] with the [[Mourning Glory III]] skill. It works the same as the [[Meat Effigy/DST|Meat Effigy]], and is one of the many ways of revival. Players can attune to a Perennial Altar or Meat Effigy at the cost of 40 {{Hp}}. When the player is dead, as a ghost they can revive at the Perennial Altar or Meat Effigy they attuned.

After resurrection:
*[[File:HealthMeter.png|24px|link=Health]] is set to 50
*[[File:HungerMeter.png|24px|link=Hunger]] is set to 2/3 of maximum
*[[File:SanityMeter.png|24px|link=Sanity]] is set to 1/2 of maximum

Multiple Perennial Altars or Meat Effigies can be built, but each player can attune to only one. An attuned Altar's candle will be lit, while others remain unlit.  

The Perennial Altar only works within its [[Shard|shard]], allowing a player to have one on the Surface and another in the [[Caves]].

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*Wendy has a special animation for reviving from the Perennial Altar.
